commit.message:
Security: Firebase Admin session cookies + Upstash rate limiting

- Replace JS-settable admin_token cookie with HttpOnly server-set __session cookie
- Add POST /api/admin/session: verifies Firebase ID token with Admin SDK, sets HttpOnly+SameSite=Strict+Secure cookie
- Add DELETE /api/admin/session: clears session cookie on logout
- Update admin login to call session API instead of document.cookie
- Update admin layout logout to call DELETE /api/admin/session
- Update middleware to check __session (HttpOnly, JS-unreadable)
- Add Upstash rate limiting (20 req/min per IP) to /api/whatsapp
- Add lib/firebase-admin.ts and lib/ratelimit.ts

fix: サンドボックスの work ディレクトリが profile_binds で ro 上書きされる問題を修正

bwrap のマウント順序で profile_binds が --bind work work より後に展開され、
profile の ro バインド（例: nosen-nvt）が work ディレクトリの rw を覆い隠していた。
profile_binds を work バインドの前に移動し、work が常に書き込み可能になるよう修正。

併せて対話セッションのウィンドウ名から -interactive サフィックスを除去。

commit.message:
feat: context-aware recall — auto-infer context from query and boost matching traits

Implement Tulving's Encoding Specificity Principle: recall automatically infers
user context (work/personal/social/learning) from query embedding via prototype
matching, then applies soft score boost (0~0.10×confidence) to matching traits.

- Add ContextService with bilingual prototype vectors + keyword fallback
- Extend scored_search with context_match_bonus SQL (whitelist-validated)
- Extend recall() return with inferred_context + context_confidence
- 52 test cases (unit/integration/e2e)
- Zero new dependencies, <1ms overhead, non-breaking API change
- Bump version to 0.9.12

fix(screen-control): ime_action fallback when no INPUT focus (ACTION_SET_TEXT case)

When type command uses ACTION_SET_TEXT, Android may not set INPUT focus,
causing findFocus(FOCUS_INPUT) to return null and skip all fallback logic.

Fix: in the no-focus path, find the first editable node on screen via
findEditableNode(), then pass its bounds to findSendButton() so the
send button is still found and clicked.

Also extracted findEditableNode() helper to avoid code duplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix star centering and reduce top padding in goal cards

Root cause analysis:
- Card has TWO rows: header (name + star) and meta (tags)
- Star was centered within header row only, not entire card
- Need to position star relative to full card height

Fixes:

1. Truly center star with card borders using absolute positioning:
   - .wireframe-goal-actions: position absolute, right 16px
   - Use top: 50% + transform: translateY(-50%) for perfect centering
   - Now centered with ENTIRE card height, not just header row
   - .wireframe-goal-header: add padding-right 48px for star space
   - .wireframe-goal-header: revert to align-items: flex-start

2. Reduce top padding:

fix(feishu): use DebugGroupService for filtered message forwarding (Issue #652) (#673)

Changed FilteredMessageForwarder to use memory-based DebugGroupService
instead of reading from config file. This aligns with the `/set-debug`
command which manages debug group in primary node memory.

Key changes:
- Removed config-based initialization (enabled, filterForwardChatId, includeReasons)
- Now uses DebugGroupService.getDebugGroup() to get current debug chat ID
- Debug group is set via `/set-debug` command and maintained in memory
- Forwards all filter reasons when debug group is set
- Added debug group info to forwarded message format
- Updated tests to use DebugGroupService

Co-authored-by: hs3180 <claude@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Security: fix critical and high vulnerabilities

- /api/upload: require admin_token cookie (was completely unauthenticated)
- /api/upload: validate file extension against allowlist (MIME type was client-controlled)
- folio.ts: replace Math.random() with crypto.randomBytes() for CSPRNG folios
- firestore.ts: use Firestore increment() for discount code counter (atomic, was always stuck at 1)
- ApartadoForm: remove stale currentUsos=0 argument from incrementDiscountUse
- admin/login: add SameSite=Strict to session cookie (CSRF hardening)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix AI Analysis — update to current Perplexity sonar model

Model llama-3.1-sonar-small-128k-online was deprecated. Updated to
'sonar' (current Perplexity API model). Also show errors in UI
instead of silently printing to server logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: use "build" in title, "production" in descriptions and JSON-LD

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent native form submission on all booking forms

Root cause: 3 of 4 booking forms were missing onSubmit handlers, so
browser autofill/implicit submit triggered native form submission
(page reload). After reload, autofill repopulated text fields but not
selects, causing the new booking form to jump into review mode with
incomplete data.

- Add onSubmit={(e) => e.preventDefault()} to new, edit, and
  individual booking forms (central already had it)
- Change isPreFilled on new booking page from reactive check to
  one-time URL param check via useRef, so browser autofill after
  reload can't falsely trigger review mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add SKILL.md template with Decision Workflow for AI Agents

Adds the OpenClaw SKILL.md template that includes:
- Command mapping and defaults
- Decision Workflow (batch compare -> pick winner -> sweep -> report)
- Common mistakes to avoid (e.g. don't sweep a non-winner strategy)

Redesign scout system with Drop/Date types, consolidate admin 13→5 tabs

- Two scout types: Drop Scout (monitors drop windows) and Date Scout
  (tracks per-slot lifecycle with appear/disappear timestamps)
- New scout_slot_sightings table for granular slot tracking
- Admin dashboard consolidated from 13 tabs to 5: Dashboard, Operations,
  Intelligence, Users, Settings
- Intelligence tab has sub-section pills (Scouts, Drop Intel, Restaurant
  Intel, Heatmap)
- Add Scout modal with venue search, type selection, date picker
- Slot timeline view showing per-slot duration bars
- Remove auto-populate (bulk-start), scouts now manually created

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add signal-cli native binary, remove sidecar dependency

OpenClaw expects to auto-spawn signal-cli directly via JSON-RPC + SSE.
The bbernhard/signal-cli-rest-api sidecar doesn't expose SSE endpoints.
Bundle signal-cli native (GraalVM, no JVM) in the container image and
let OpenClaw manage the daemon lifecycle.

Add lazy chop mode for SP-240 style real-time sample chopping

Play a sample and tap pad 1 to mark chop points in real time.
Slice mode now cycles Even > Auto > Lazy. Lazy has Chop and Play
sub-modes. Back button or end-of-playback finalizes the session
and switches to Play for auditioning/export.

editing items show inverse highlight, and jog/knob changes no
longer overlay the footer with status messages. Knobs and jog
are locked during active chopping.
